title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
